raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged for an item that was proven to be returned and the merchant, XXXX, says they have refunded me. CITI are animals and THIEVES. Citi is the one charging me and I should not be charged. 
XXXX ) I am not in possession of the item XXXX ) The merchant has the item XXXX ) I have records the Merchant has the item. 
Yet Citi refuses to refund my CC. The issue isnt the merchant at this point its Citi who keeps billing me which is complete Theft and in violation of the Fair Credit Act. 
Citi must be stopped, penalized and investigated for such illicit activity. 
The amount in question is for XXXX for a charge on XX/XX/XXXX. 

THE MOST EGREGIOUS PART IS THAT CITI CONTINUOUSLY CLAIMS THY GAVE ME CREDIT. THIS IS ABSURD AND PROVABLY FALSE. I have multiple credits from that merchant but I have more than multiple charged from them as well and any credits are unrelated to this XX/XX/XXXX charge in question. CITI IS INCOMPETENT. They should be investigated and if nothing happens from this complained I will have to pursue this as a class action. I already have 5 clients testifying about Citi denying disputes illegally against the Fair Credit Act. The disputes were submitted in writing and ye Citi refused because they are lazy thieves.
